scripts.postbuild: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const cp=(s,d)=>{fs.mkdirSync(d,{recursive:true});for(const e of fs.readdirSync(s,{withFileTypes:true})){const a=path.join(s,e.name),b=path.join(d,e.name);e.isDirectory()?cp(a,b):fs.copyFileSync(a,b)}};fs.rmSync('docs',{recursive:true,force:true});cp('dist','docs');fs.writeFileSync('docs/.nojekyll','');console.log('Copied dist -> docs')"
